completeness_boundary: The full cited PDF was reviewed and searched. not_reported means that no explicit statement was found in that source.

probes.question: Does InternAgent use an LLM to generate research ideas or hypotheses from task and scientific context?
Does InternAgent score generated ideas on novelty and other dimensions to support ranking?
Can human-provided critiques cause InternAgent to refine or adjust one or more ideas?
Can results from earlier experiments cause InternAgent to re-plan later experiments?
Does InternAgent use only a single-pass implementation strategy without performance-based refinement?
Does every evolved idea advance into the next idea-evolution round?
Does InternAgent's debugging cycle continue indefinitely even after successful execution or reaching its iteration threshold?
Does InternAgent's adaptive implementation refinement rely on theoretical assumptions alone rather than empirical results?
Does the source report probabilistic calibration of the Assessment Agent's scores against observed correctness frequencies?
Does the source report an independent replication of InternAgent's experimental results by a separate laboratory?
Does the source report an external acceptance or rejection decision that controls InternAgent's next internal search action?
Does the source report InternAgent executing a wet-lab experiment or other physical assay?
